info.name: AI-Enabled Wound APIs
info.description: Postman collection for the AI-Enabled Wound APIs. Nurse-side APIs are complete; doctor and patient foundations are included through shared routes.

exec: if (json.user && json.user.id) { pm.environment.set('userId', json.user.id); pm.environment.set('nurseId', json.user.id); }
if (json.user && json.user.id) { pm.environment.set('userId', json.user.id); if (json.user.role === 'nurse') pm.environment.set('nurseId', json.user.id); }

body.raw:
{
  "nurse_id": {{nurseId}},
  "first_name": "Michael",
  "last_name": "Roberts",
  "date_of_birth": "1968-04-10",
  "gender": "male",
  "mrn": "MRN-{{$timestamp}}",
  "address": "Patient address",
  "room": "Surgical Ward, Room 204, Bed 7",
  "wound_type": "Diabetic Foot Ulcer",
  "primary_staff": "Nurse Johnson",
  "backup_staff": "Dr. Harrison",
  "primary_diagnosis": "Post-Op Incision",
  "allergies_notes": "Penicillin, Sulfa drugs"
}

{
  "title": "Wound dressing change",
  "description": "Change wound dressing and document progress.",
  "task_type": "wound",
  "priority": "high",
  "status": "pending",
  "patient_id": {{patientId}},
  "wound_case": "Diabetic Foot Ulcer",
  "assigned_by": {{nurseId}},
  "assigned_to": {{nurseId}},
  "due_date": "2026-07-01",
  "due_time": "10:30",
  "task_notes": "Use sterile dressing."
}

{
  "patient_id": {{patientId}},
  "wound_type": "Diabetic Foot Ulcer",
  "severity_stage": "Stage III",
  "pain_score": 7,

  "length_cm": 3.5,
  "width_cm": 2.2,
  "depth_cm": 0.5,
  "images": [

      "url": "https://example.com/wound.jpg",

    }
  ],
  "notes": "Initial wound case."
}

{
  "title": "Stage updated to III",
  "summary": "Wound bed shows 70% granulation tissue.",
  "severity_stage": "Stage III",
  "healing_progress": 70,
  "priority": "high",
  "dressing_type": "Foam dressing",
  "instructions": "Increase dressing frequency to every 24h.",
  "frequency": "Every 24 hours",
  "next_review_at": "2026-07-02",

    "length_cm": 3.5,
    "width_cm": 2.2,
    "depth_cm": 0.5,

  },

  "images": [

    }
  ],

}

{
  "task_alerts": true,
